sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet package for BLUE_1717_PB_SHEET_ASSY, part number MSV-200002, supplied by ㈜케이원코퍼레이션 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier approval documentation covering revision history, drawings, raw material list, material properties, QC process plan, inspection criteria, and packaging specification.
keyPoints: Applies to models G1717CW and G1717CWP.
Supplier approval dates are listed as 2025/03/12.
Revision history records Rev. 0 as initial establishment on 3/12/25.
Raw materials listed include 0.1T PB SHEET and ST-5487AS.
QC process flow includes incoming inspection, lamination, punching, cutting, inspection and packing, outgoing inspection, and shipment.

concepts.name: Non-use Certificate for Restricted Substances
concepts.evidence: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for BLUE_1717_PB_SHEET_ASSY.
evidence.evidenceText: 승 인 원 [Approval Sheet] ... 제품명(PRODUCT NAME),,,,,,,BLUE_1717_PB_SHEET_ASSY

evidence.claim: The part or model number is MSV-200002.
The approval sheet applies to models G1717CW and G1717CWP.
The approval package table of contents includes cover, revision history, drawing, raw material list, material property sheet, QC process flow, and product inspection criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: 1. 승인원 표지 ... 2. 승인원 제/개정 이력 ... 3. 도면 ... 4. 종합 원재료 LIST ... 5. 원재료 물성표 ... 6. QC 공정도 ... 7. 제품 검사 기준서

evidence.claim: The raw material list includes 0.1T PB SHEET with maker 자연.
The raw material list includes ST-5487AS with maker 대현ST.
The QC process plan identifies mass production as the selected stage.
evidence.evidenceText: □ 시작품 Pilot ... □ 선행 양산 Pre-Prod. ... ■ 양 산 Mass-Prod.

evidence.claim: The QC control plan category identifies PVS as selected.
evidence.evidenceText: Control Plan Category,,,,'□ DVS, ■ PVS, □ PRS, □ SOP'

evidence.claim: Outgoing inspection covers appearance, dimensions, and thickness with AQL 0.65 at one time per lot.
The packaging specification states that PB product packaging for delivery to H&abyz follows the listed method.
evidence.evidenceText: H&abyz 에 납품되는 PB 제품 포장 방법은 다음과 같다.

evidence.claim: The packaging specification prohibits stacking more than one layer.
